name: Sync-in Server
description: Installs the Sync-in server binary from github.com/Sync-in/server releases. Makes this devcontainer a self-contained Sync-in node that starts automatically via the sync-in-server automation service.

version.description: Sync-in server version to install. 'latest' installs the current release.

install_dir.description: Directory to install the sync-in-server binary into.
